  "message": "You are implementing Task 2: Add `packages/shared` utility primitives.\n\nCRITICAL EXECUTION LOCATION:\n- ONLY work in: C:\\Users\\ai\\.config\\superpowers\\worktrees\\openfons\\repo-skeleton-v1\n- Before any edits, confirm with `Get-Location` from that exact worktree.\n- Do not touch D:\\demo1\\openfons.\n\nYou are not alone in the codebase. Do not revert edits you did not make. Your ownership is limited to:\n- packages/shared/**\n- tests/contract/shared-utils.test.ts\n- tests/contract/.gitkeep if cleanup is needed\n- pnpm-lock.yaml only if it changes naturally (it probably should not for this task)\n\nUse superpowers:test-driven-development strictly.\n\n## Task Description\n\n### Task 2: Add `packages/shared` utility primitives\n\nFiles:\n- Create: `packages/shared/package.json`\n- Create: `packages/shared/tsconfig.json`\n- Create: `packages/shared/src/id.ts`\n- Create: `packages/shared/src/text.ts`\n- Create: `packages/shared/src/time.ts`\n- Create: `packages/shared/src/index.ts`\n- Test: `tests/contract/shared-utils.test.ts`\n\nStep 1: Write the failing shared-utility test:\n```ts\nimport { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';\nimport { createId, nowIso, slugify } from '@openfons/shared';\n\ndescribe('@openfons/shared', () => {\n  afterEach(() => {\n    vi.useRealTimers();\n  });\n\n  it('slugify normalizes human-readable titles', () => {\n    expect(slugify('AI Coding Model Procurement Options')).toBe(\n      'ai-coding-model-procurement-options'\n    );\n  });\n\n  it('createId prefixes generated ids', () => {\n    expect(createId('opp')).toMatch(/^opp_[a-z0-9]{8}$/);\n  });\n\n  it('nowIso returns an ISO timestamp', () => {\n    vi.useFakeTimers();\n    vi.setSystemTime(new Date('2026-03-27T12:00:00.000Z'));\n\n    expect(nowIso()).toBe('2026-03-27T12:00:00.000Z');\n  });\n});\n```\n\nStep 2: Run the shared-utility test and verify it fails.\nRun:\n`pnpm test -- tests/contract/shared-utils.test.ts`\nExpected: FAIL because `@openfons/shared` does not exist yet.\n\nStep 3: Implement the shared package:\n\npackages/shared/package.json\n```json\n{\n  \"name\": \"@openfons/shared\",\n  \"private\": true,\n  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n  \"type\": \"module\",\n  \"main\": \"./dist/index.js\",\n  \"types\": \"./dist/index.d.ts\",\n  \"exports\": {\n    \".\": {\n      \"types\": \"./dist/index.d.ts\",\n      \"default\": \"./dist/index.js\"\n    }\n  },\n  \"scripts\": {\n    \"build\": \"tsc -p tsconfig.json\",\n    \"lint\": \"tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit\",\n    \"typecheck\": \"tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit\"\n  }\n}\n```\n\npackages/shared/tsconfig.json\n```json\n{\n  \"extends\": \"../../tsconfig.base.json\",\n  \"compilerOptions\": {\n    \"module\": \"NodeNext\",\n    \"moduleResolution\": \"NodeNext\",\n    \"declaration\": true,\n    \"rootDir\": \"src\",\n    \"outDir\": \"dist\"\n  },\n  \"include\": [\"src/**/*\"]\n}\n```\n\npackages/shared/src/id.ts\n```ts\nexport const createId = (prefix: string): string => {\n  const suffix = Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10);\n  return `${prefix}_${suffix}`;\n};\n```\n\npackages/shared/src/text.ts\n```ts\nexport const slugify = (value: string): string =>\n  value\n    .trim()\n    .toLowerCase()\n    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')\n    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');\n```\n\npackages/shared/src/time.ts\n```ts\nexport const nowIso = (): string => new Date().toISOString();\n```\n\npackages/shared/src/index.ts\n```ts\nexport * from './id.js';\nexport * from './text.js';\nexport * from './time.js';\n```\n\nStep 4: Run the shared-utility test again and verify it passes.\nRun:\n- `pnpm test -- tests/contract/shared-utils.test.ts`\n- `pnpm --filter @openfons/shared lint`\nExpected: test passes and shared package lint/typecheck passes.\n\nStep 5: Commit the shared package.\nCommit message: `feat(shared): add workspace utility primitives`\n\n## Context\n- Task 1 is complete. Root workspace bootstrap is at HEAD `e093fa9` and `pnpm test` / `pnpm check` are green.\n- `packages/shared/src/.gitkeep` and `tests/contract/.gitkeep` currently exist from scaffold tracking. Remove those placeholder files if your real files replace the need for them.\n- Do not implement Task 3 or any other package.\n\n## Verification Requirements\nYou must report:\n- `Get-Location`\n- the failing test command result before implementation\n- the passing test command result after implementation\n- `pnpm --filter @openfons/shared lint`\n- `git status --short` after commit\n\n## Report Format\n- Status\n- Confirmed working directory\n- What you implemented\n- Exact verification results (red then green)\n- Files changed\n- Commit SHA\n- Self-review findings\n- Any issues or concerns"
}

{
  "name": "openfons",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "packageManager": "pnpm@10.7.1",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "pnpm -r --parallel --filter @openfons/control-api --filter @openfons/control-web --filter @openfons/report-web dev",
    "build": "pnpm -r build",
    "lint": "pnpm -r lint",
    "typecheck": "pnpm -r typecheck",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:watch": "vitest",
    "check": "pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@openfons/shared": "workspace:*",
    "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.6.3",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.2.0",
    "@types/node": "^22.13.11",
    "jsdom": "^26.0.0",
    "tsx": "^4.19.3",
    "typescript": "^5.8.2",
    "vite": "^6.2.2",
    "vite-tsconfig-paths": "^5.1.4",
    "vitest": "^3.0.9"
  }
}


---FILE---

{
  "extends": "./tsconfig.base.json"
}


---FILE---

{
  "name": "@openfons/shared",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "type": "module",
  "main": "./dist/index.js",
  "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
  "exports": {
    ".": {
      "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
      "default": "./dist/index.js"
    }
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "tsc -p tsconfig.json",
    "lint": "tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit",
    "typecheck": "tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit"
  }
}


---FILE---

{
  "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json",
  "compilerOptions": {
    "module": "NodeNext",
    "moduleResolution": "NodeNext",
    "declaration": true,
    "rootDir": "src",
    "outDir": "dist"
  },
  "include": ["src/**/*"]
}


---FILE---

export const createId = (prefix: string): string => {
  const suffix = Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10);
  return `${prefix}_${suffix}`;
};


---FILE---

export const slugify = (value: string): string =>
  value
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');


---FILE---

export const nowIso = (): string => new Date().toISOString();


---FILE---

export * from './id.js';
export * from './text.js';
export * from './time.js';


---FILE---

import { afterEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
import { createId, nowIso, slugify } from '@openfons/shared';

describe('@openfons/shared', () => {
  afterEach(() => {
    vi.useRealTimers();
  });

  it('slugify normalizes human-readable titles', () => {
    expect(slugify('AI Coding Model Procurement Options')).toBe(
      'ai-coding-model-procurement-options'
    );
  });

  it('createId prefixes generated ids', () => {
    expect(createId('opp')).toMatch(/^opp_[a-z0-9]{8}$/);
  });

  it('nowIso returns an ISO timestamp', () => {
    vi.useFakeTimers();
    vi.setSystemTime(new Date('2026-03-27T12:00:00.000Z'));

    expect(nowIso()).toBe('2026-03-27T12:00:00.000Z');
  });
});
